summary_markdown: The following business processes demonstrate how different personas interact with the Core Information Standard to deliver integrated care. Each process captures critical data elements and supports information flow between health and social care professionals.

activities.objectives: To identify, document and share reasonable adjustments required under the Equality Act 2010, ensuring all services can provide accessible care.
activities.personas: Social Worker, GP/Primary Care Physician, Care Coordinator
activities.title: Reasonable Adjustments Identification and Recording

activities.objectives: To identify, assess, document and manage safeguarding concerns in accordance with statutory requirements.
activities.personas: Social Worker, GP/Primary Care Physician, Hospital Consultant, Care Home Manager
activities.title: Safeguarding Concern Management

activities.objectives: To develop person-centred care plans that integrate health and social care needs, with clear goals and actions.
activities.personas: Care Coordinator, GP/Primary Care Physician, Social Worker, Allied Health Professional, Person/Patient Representative
activities.title: Integrated Care Planning

activities.objectives: To ensure safe medication management during transitions of care with complete reconciliation.
activities.personas: GP/Primary Care Physician, Hospital Consultant, Community Nurse, Care Home Manager
activities.title: Medication Management Across Settings

activities.objectives: To sensitively plan and document end of life care preferences ensuring dignity and respect for person's wishes.
activities.personas: Hospital Consultant, GP/Primary Care Physician, Community Nurse, Person/Patient Representative, Care Coordinator
activities.title: End of Life Care Planning
